programme.title: Botched: Face Misfor-CHIN
programme.desc: A facial skin graft growing pubic hair challenges Dr. Nassif, while Dr. Dubrow boogies with a boob dancing patient who's back for surgery, and meanwhile, the doctors try and help an ordinary man become Super Man.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Plastic surgeons visit and help patients who have had botched cosmetic surgeries.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Fraser Fabulous
programme.desc: Matt Fraser is a psychic medium, but he couldn't see the future clearly enough to know that hiring his family would lead to trouble. After a breakdown, he asks his stylist to make the Frasers look more professional.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Morning Cookie
programme.desc: Matt's parents, Rod and Angela, move in with Matt and have their 'morning cookie' day and night and psychic powers can't save him now! Alexa kicks off her beauty pageant prep and Matt helps her pick out his perfect pageant dress.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Botched: Zombie Breasts
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif kicks the butt off a patient' nose, while Dr. Dubrow helps a single mother whose breast implant fell out while brushing her teeth. Meanwhile, a transgender twin needs the doctors help in completing her Bimbo Barbie transformation.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Fraser Fabulous

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: The biggest and most talked about stories of the day in pop culture.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: I'd Rather Go Naked ... Or Shopping
programme.desc: Khloe faces body image issues when she agrees to do a nude campaign for PETA and Kim's family worries about her massive shopping habit.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pussycat Vision
programme.desc: Bruce gets his first colonoscopy as Kim deals with eye surgery just before a Pussycat Doll performance.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All for One and One for Kim
programme.desc: A secret business deal causes a huge blowout within the family and Kris tries to find a common interest with Bruce.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cinderella Story
programme.desc: Rob starts acting erratically so the sisters have no choice but to confront him. Khloe believes she's adopted so she gets a DNA test to determine whether she's really a Kardashian.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Two Year Itch
programme.desc: Kourtney accuses Scott of cheating and Khloe has a biopsy for skin cancer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Distance Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Khloe goes to New York to host a fashion show while Kim is forced to choose between her boyfriend and her career.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Khloe goes apartment hunting in New York. The girls get Kris a monkey to help pacify her baby syndrome.

programme.title: Pop of the Morning
programme.desc: Jessie James Decker joins us live in studio.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We're hanging with 'Bad Boys for Life' stars Charles Melton and Alexander Ludwig. Plus, Heather Dubrow joins us live in the studio.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Press Pass
programme.desc: Khloé and Kourtney butt heads over the design of their fitness line. Kim thinks the family needs media training to learn to handle controversial topics.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: My Mother's Keeper
programme.desc: Khloe struggles to keep her temper under control and Kris secretly plants a tracking device on her mother. Kim wonders if Kourtney's gluten-free diet is actually healthy.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mime Over Matter
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Kourtney must decide whether to take a trip to Egypt without her kids. Meanwhile Khloé recognizes that the stress of dealing with six kids is weighing on Kris, so she hires a mime to cheer her mom up.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 3
programme.desc: In the third of four preliminary competitions, a new group of teen chefs arrives in the Chopped Kitchen with tons of energy, which they put to good use cooking short rib appetizers. An already-cooked, artificially coloured ingredient appears.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 4
programme.desc: Four more teen chefs battle it out for the last spot in the $25,000 finale. A can of something strange and a bottle of something sour are two of the ingredients in the appetizer round.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Finale Fight
programme.desc: Four teens winners have returned to compete in the grand finale of the tournament with $25,000 at stake. The young cooks find a surf-and-turf combination in the first round. Butchering skills come into play in the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Whiz Kid Cooks
programme.desc: Kids who love to cook take over the Chopped Kitchen to prove they are forces to be reckoned with in the culinary world. The young competitors focus on finding creative ways to prepare ground chicken in round one.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Extra Icing: Beyond the Fringe
programme.desc: To kick off the season, Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are going back to the 1970s as they challenge the 12 young competitors to make shag cakes. Each baker must make a cake in their chosen flavor and then decorate it to create a shag texture.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: 1, 2, 3 Delicious!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Simple Weeknight Solutions
programme.desc: Trisha shares some of her easy recipes with her friend Julie. They make lemon citrus fish, white rice herb pilaf, and skillet apple pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Counting Calories Southern Style
programme.desc: Trisha's trainer, Billie Jo, comes to Trisha's kitchen to learn how to make surprisingly healthy Southern recipes -- but still doesn't let her get out of her daily workout. Trisha makes Corn Flake Chicken and a winter veggie soup with a side Greek salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Healthy Kickstart
programme.desc: After years on tour with husband Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is looking forward to settling back into a routine. Always on the search for a fun workout, Trisha invites her friend, Natalie, to check out the hippest new workout -- goat yoga.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Guilty Pleasures

programme.desc: Blair has mixed feelings when Rachel is honored for her service in the military. Meanwhile, the Bennett-Blatt family—and the live-studio audience—create an award ceremony unlike anything before.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have a Frozen Phone?
programme.desc: Cooper is nervous about his upcoming Junior Firefighters test, but everyone assures him that he’ll pass because his dad was a firefighter.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Caved and Confused
programme.desc: Judy enlists Grandma Judy to help her redesign the basement into their very own 'girl cave.' Max starts to feel left out when Sydney cancels their plans together to throw a 50s-themed party with her friends to celebrate her new space.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Queen of Screams
programme.desc: Jorge enters a short story contest and wins a dinner with his favorite horror novelist, Stephanie Queen, and decides to bring along a few of his fellow campers for the thrilling experience. Meanwhile, Xander must act as referee between Emma and Ravi.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Dia De La Dina
programme.desc: 'Dia de la Dina' is coming and Gabby is determined to get her mom a gift that makes up for last year's disaster. Meanwhile, Swift prepares for the end of his assignment on Earth.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The Elevator
programme.desc: After an argument at the station about who caused the destruction of the radio booth, the Bennett-Blatt family get stuck in an elevator. When they become convinced that they'll never be rescued, each family member confesses.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Because
programme.desc: Raven opens up about her own visions to the kids, sharing a special moment with Booker. The two team up to try and locate the missing money. Nia feels left out and fakes having a vision.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cop to It
programme.desc: Raven worries Tess is in trouble after the new building manager looks for the culprit behind the side of the building being tagged.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: There's Something About Zach
programme.desc: When Max realizes he needs an extra hand at the bike shop smoothie station, Sydney and Olive convince him to hire their crush, Zach.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Nuthin' But a Dance Thang
programme.desc: Syd thinks she's too old for the father-daughter dance, but she's afraid to hurt Dad's feelings. Young Max is bummed when his Dad isn't around for a father-son event.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Take a Worm Shower?
programme.desc: Fred worries that Cooper is going to steal away his new friend.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Wreck a Record?
programme.desc: Cami loses her confidence when Minty gets in her head during an archery contest.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Reversal of Fortune
programme.desc: The counselors clean out the storage and find a fortune teller machine. They pull it out and it reads something important will go missing and a sister will betray another sister.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Game of Totems
programme.desc: When everyone prepares for the upcoming camp tournament, The Kikiwaka Cup, Zuri, captain of the campers team, is confident that they’re finally going to win against the counselors.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Toilets and Tiaras
programme.desc: Zuri hosts a beauty pageant at Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal
programme.desc: In an effort to help Ravi make friends, Jessie takes him to a MENSA meeting in the park. However, their new friends, Madeline and Scott, may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: FlyAlong/RockABye Birdie
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Puppy Sitting Adventure

programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Beaker 2.0/When You Wish Upon a Rizzo
programme.desc: Bunsen creates a Beaker 2.0; The Muppet Babies are visited by Rizzo the Genie.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Giganto Power/ Crying Wolfasaurus
programme.desc: Rocky wants’ a powerful tail, and Bill discovers that "crying wolf" gets him out of his responsibilities.

programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.desc: When Gibbs and McGee's missions overseas is compromised, the team races to locate them before a Russian Mercenary group gets to them.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill the Messenger
programme.desc: When a Navy lieutenant is killed on his way to a private meeting with the president, the NCIS team must determine if the murder was part of recent stream of muggings in the area or a targeted hit to keep intel secret.

programme.title: NCIS: So It Goes
programme.desc: When an NCIS case reveals a connection to Ducky's estranged childhood best friend, he and Special Agent Bishop travel to London for interviews with family and co-workers of his friend.

programme.title: NCIS: Choke Hold
programme.desc: The Secretary of the Navy assigns the team to a joint terrorism task force after a naval research scientist is murdered and the lead suspect is wanted by the Russian government. In order to get a jump on the case, Gibbs has DiNozzo run interference.

programme.title: NCIS: The San Dominick
programme.desc: During a joint Coast Guard and NCIS training exercise at sea, Gibbs and Agent Borin spot a deceased man overboard, who is discovered to be a missing crew member from a ship 60 nautical miles away. Gibbs boards the ship that was commandeered by pirates.

programme.title: NCIS: Parental Guidance Suggested
programme.desc: The team must determine if the murder of a navy commander's wife is linked to her profession as a therapist, or an act of terrorism, after finding the commander's name on a Jihadist target list. Meanwhile, the team discusses Halloween costumes.

programme.title: NCIS: The Searchers
programme.desc: After investigating the murder of a retired Master Sergeant, the team uncovers a fraudulent charity that preys on those searching for missing military personnel. Meanwhile, Bishop agonizes over the results of her probation evaluation.

programme.title: Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector: Pilot
programme.desc: Three years after the Bone Collector ended his career, Detective Lincoln Rhyme teams with NYPD officer Amelia Sachs to investigate a series of murders that suggest the killer's return and an unlikely team is born.

programme.title: NCIS: Semper Fortis
programme.desc: While the team investigates the cause of a hit and run accident that resulted in the death of a petty officer, Gibbs searches for a way to clear the corpsman who provided medical aid at the scene of the accident.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Blasters
programme.desc: When the body of a former child star is found beaten and murdered, detectives discover a history of drug abuse and a secret headquarters in the back of an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The War at Home
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Eames are called to help Commissioner Leland Dockerty and his wife find their daughter, a female soldier who went missing while home on leave.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Weeping Willow
programme.desc: After popular video blogger Willow and her boyfriend, Holden, are seen kidnapped live online by two violent assailants, Detectives Logan and Wheeler are assigned to the high-profile case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Life Is Fluid
programme.desc: Intelligence is in pursuit of Derek Keyes, number one on Chicago's most wanted list and a heroin kingpin. Halstead keeps trying to get through to Lindsay as her downward spiral continues.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Natural Born Storyteller
programme.desc: While pursuing a gangbanger, Burgess and Roman come across the body of an 8-year-old boy who was reported missing. Intelligence launches an investigation to find the killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Actual Physical Violence
programme.desc: A member of the team is held hostage by a man who is desperate to find his missing daughter. Elsewhere, Voight finds out that Bunny is bringing up new accusations on a case from his past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Debts of the Past
programme.desc: After surviving a hit against him, Voight is convinced the culprit is a criminal he and Olinksy once put away. At the district, Atwater accidentally spills information about Ruzek's past, which unsettles Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Climbing Into Bed
programme.desc: After a botched undercover job, Ruzek is under scrutiny by the new Street Deputy Crowley who will determine his future with the unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God
programme.desc: A doctor with personal connections to Voight is under investigation when four of his patients are committed to Chicago Med after an overdose of chemo.

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly Radner are expecting their second child, so they prepare to move out of their house. A sorority moves in next door, and the couple find that the girls are way more trouble than the fraternity. They are forced to get Teddy's help.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Scoutz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: After drinking a very sugary beverage, Bart awakens with no memory of what happened and discovers he has joined a boy scout troop. Bart and Homer reluctantly take a father-son river rafting trip that has them encountering disaster in every turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Temptation of Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is forced to hire a woman after violating labour laws. Homer soon begins to daydream about Mindy, the new employee, and he finds himself in a difficult situation when they go on a business trip together. Meanwhile, Bart gets branded as a nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: $pringfield (Or How I Learned To Stop Worrying and Love Legalized Gambling)
programme.desc: In an attempt to improve Springfield's situation, Mr. Burns builds a casino on the waterfront. Homer becomes a dealer at the casino, Bart sets up a rival casino in his tree house and Marge develops a gambling addiction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Vigilante
programme.desc: A cat burglar robs starts terrorizing Springfield, and even steals Lisa's saxophone. In his attempt to retrieve it for her, Homer turns a neighbourhood watch group into a vigilante group and enjoys a cat-and-mouse game with the burglar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Famous
programme.desc: Bart is launched into instant stardom with Krusty the Klown after wrecking the set.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer and Apu
programme.desc: Apu is fired after Homer gets food poisoning from eating the Kwik-E-Mart's food.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey
programme.desc: Lisa creates a feminist doll and goes head-to-head with Malibu Stacey.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Deep Space Homer
programme.desc: Homer is sent into space as part of NASA's attempt to revitalize interest in its missions.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Loves Flanders
programme.desc: Homer becomes Ned's best friend after he gives him a ticket to a much hyped football game.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets an Elephant
programme.desc: Bart forgoes a radio station's $10,000 cash prize and demands an elephant instead.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Burns' Heir
programme.desc: After nearly drowning in the bathtub, Mr. Burns decides to make Bart Simpson his heir.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sweet Seymour Skinner's Badass Song
programme.desc: Bart brings the family dog to school for show and tell and gets Principal Skinner fired.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Sells Out
programme.desc: Charlie and Dee are forced to find new jobs when a corporate venture offers to buy Paddy's. Dee uses her friendship with the waitress to get them jobs.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank Sets Sweet Dee on Fire

programme.title: Mom: Horny-Goggles and a Catered Intervention
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to be supportive when Regina tells them she doesn't think she's an alcoholic and Wendy tries to convince the women to attend a sober holiday dance.

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
programme.desc: Christy hosts a family dinner for Violet's hard-to-please future mother-in-law. Also, Bonnie balks when Steve wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Mom: Snickerdoodle and a Nip Slip
programme.desc: When Christy catches the eye of Candace's wealthy, charming father, Fred, Candace and Baxter are outraged, while Bonnie pushes Christy to give him a chance.

programme.title: Movie: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends celebrating a bachelorette weekend at a beach house in Miami have their lives turn upside down when they accidentally kill a male stripper. After illegally moving the body they go to crazy lengths to cover things up and avoid jail time.

programme.title: Movie: Why Him?
programme.desc: Over the holidays, Ned takes his family to visit his daughter at Stanford. There, he meets her Silicon Valley billionaire boyfriend Laird. Immediately disliking him, an intense rivalry develops. Ned attempts to convince his daughter to break up with him.

programme.title: Movie: Push
programme.desc: A young group of ex-patriate Americans try to hide from a U.S. Government agency that is out to capture them for experiments. They have psychic abilities and must use every skill they have not to be captured.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy
programme.desc: While investigating a newly discovered Egyptian tomb, a team of explorers accidentally releases the evil mummified princess that was imprisoned within. Having only grown more malevolent and more evil over time, the mummy sets out to reshape the world.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Revealing the riches and wonders of the Polar Regions that keep people coming for years. Its survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting edge science.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: An Epic Journey
programme.desc: The very best highlights of the series, taking viewers on a spectacular journey through the entire polar year, from the depths of winter to the melting world of the polar summer.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Double Trouble

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: The Earth was formed by a series of cosmic cataclysms including the most powerful blast in the Universe. Look at whether the same chain of events could have created other earths inhabited by creatures like us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Siberian Hell Pit
programme.desc: A massive chasm appears in a remote part of the Siberian forest, and locals call it to a gate to the underworld. Images of a nuclear missile launch silo in Montana are being manipulated. A bright green spiral appears in the Persian Gulf.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Satan in Siberia
programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: While trying to survive constant harassment, violence and the stress of incarceration, the participants continue to grind out their time in the Clark County Jail, but two of them are reaching a tipping point and for them everything is about to change.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Dangerous Loyalty
programme.desc: The remaining six participants face turning points as they reconsider and recalibrate their reasons for taking part in the program. While Ryan may be losing himself and becoming an inmate, Ashleigh has a life-altering realization about her life.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Institutional Knowledge
programme.desc: New challenges emerge after the men switch pods and the women suspect a snitch.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Sewer Gate
programme.desc: The C-Pod inmates wake up to a geyser of raw sewage spewing out of a drain in the floor. Elsewhere, Ashleigh and Ashley Leezer are still stewing about a fight when a corrections officer informs them about the sewage.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Trouble in Store
programme.desc: With the sewer line repaired, the participants return to their pods only to encounter new challenges and dangerous threats.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Blood, Debt and Tears
programme.desc: Tension is running high in the pods as the six remaining participants enter their final days in the Clark County Jail.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Bed and Baggage
programme.desc: In the final days of their stay in the Clark County Jail, the three remaining participants gather their last bits of evidence and narrowly avoid conflict before their names are called for bed and baggage.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Rookie Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is ten weeks in to her field training and makes a potentially fatal mistake. She and her boyfriend - also a rookie - must learn to deal with the realities that come with the dangerous job.

programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Master Manipulator
programme.desc: When Brian Cargill divorced his wife, Kimberly, he thought it was the end of the worst time of his life. Instead, he found himself in a desperate battle to save his son, Jamie, from her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Death in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: The suicide of a 16-year-old Utah teenager was a tragedy, but how it happened may have also been a crime. A friend who had many opportunities to stop her helped her complete the act instead.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Death in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: The suicide of a 16-year-old Utah teenager was a tragedy, but how it happened may have also been a crime. A friend who had many opportunities to stop her helped her complete the act instead.

programme.title: Twisted: Murder Mates
programme.desc: In 1984, a killer couple goes on a brutal killing spree throughout the Midwest. After claiming the lives of 8 victims, the pair must decide if they'll keep killing or surrender to the police. Their mindless violence leaves the region shocked and appalled.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Clash of the Tartans
programme.desc: Southern Oregon is a campers' paradise...but for one local businessman's family a weekend in the woods will become a nightmare. Open marriages and forbidden relationships will lead to someone's watery grave.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rotten to the Core
programme.desc: The heartland of Nebraska is not immune to murderous revenge. A once-happy family is frayed by anger and jealousy when an unlikely affair is revealed, and a scandalous tattoo seals the fate of more than one member of this family.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rocking the Cradle
programme.desc: In quiet, little Honesdale, Pennsylvania one family endures heartache, teen pregnancy and addiction, but keeps moving forward. It's only when someone from the past disturbs the delicate balance is murder in the midst.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Children of the Scorn
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest may be full of gloomy weather, but one local family sees only rainbows. Three generations of an established household appear to have it all until a stash of guns and a secret video reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rumors Lies and Murder
programme.desc: Two sisters are found murdered in a heart-breaking double homicide. The evidence police discover paint a grim picture of the crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Scattered Clues, Shattered Lives
programme.desc: After two terrifyingly similar crimes, just days apart, a wave of fear sweeps across Aurora Colorado. Can police stop a hammer wielding madman before he strikes again?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Taken from Her Bed
programme.desc: An 8-year-old girl disappears from her bedroom in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Last Call
programme.desc: A traumatized man calls 911 after seeing his friend shot and killed right before his eyes. With a surprisingly long list of suspects, investigators must sort through layers of lies, jealousy, and mistrust, until they finally uncover the shooter.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Torched Heart
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 saying an intruder just entered her home and shot her husband. When the victim, a local fire chief, dies from his injuries, the first responder community works tirelessly to find out who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Shadow of Death
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, whispering that intruders broke into her home, bound her and her son, and attacked her husband. Police arrive and find the husband dead and the killers gone. Investigators struggle to expose the twisted mastermind behind the crime.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Honeymoon Horror
programme.desc: Instead of a honeymoon, newlyweds Nate and Danielle chose to buy and completely remodel a 40-year-old home by themselves. Ten months later, only one room is complete and the house is un-livable.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Contractor for a Day
programme.desc: With just two months to gut and remodel their entire home, Nate's new contractor throws out his back the day before construction begins on the kitchen addition.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Tear it Down
programme.desc: Nate and Danielle experience non-stop setbacks as they race toward their Thanksgiving date. A contractor finds wood rot and recommends tearing down and rebuilding their whole sunroom. Nate sees red as his budget gets blown up by unexpected expenses.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Nate and Danielle decided to save money by living with Danielle's dad while working on their house. Now the time and stress of commuting to the renovation and working late into the night is taking a toll.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Hiding Under the Carpet
programme.desc: Nate and Danielle start to work on their hoem when their contractor finds asbestos under the old carpet.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Blueboard Blues
programme.desc: Nate and Danielle panic when a contractor fails to show up to plaster the new walls on the first floor.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Nate agrees to let Danielle mix glitter into the exterior stucco of the house.

programme.title: Family Under Construction: Thanksgiving Blitz
programme.desc: The newlyweds are running out of time and budget before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a New Log Home for the Boy Scouts
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders volunteer to help Boy Scout troop 248 build a new lodge out of their old lodge. The boys' determination gives the Barnwood Builders something in return; hope for the future.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding After the Flood
programme.desc: Nearby, the town of White Sulphur Springs was devastated by a recent flood. Mark and the guys step up to help their neighbour rebuild. They repair a garage by wrapping it in barnwood and use log skins to transform a shed into a playroom.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Showroom Transformation
programme.desc: The builders transform a nearby office space into a showroom for their business. They use vertical barnwood, horizontal barnwood and a timber frame facade, then finish the room off with barn doors and reclaimed roofing tin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mark Finds His Dream Home Barn
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mark Bowe has found the barn he wants to turn into his own home. The guys work carefully to take apart the enormous bank barn without breaking any of the beams. Mark visits a nearby barn that has been transformed for weddings.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Gift for Graham
programme.desc: Deep in a West Virginia holler, the team builds a log potting shed for one of their own, Graham. They outfit the building with reclaimed materials from roof to porch, and Graham discovers the challenges of being a client.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout
programme.desc: After crashing Ma Beagle’s birthday party, Webby and a new mysterious friend must get back home.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Curse Club/ Casket if you Can
programme.desc: Pedro desperately tries to throw a curse. Mavis loses a casket with Aunt Lydia resting inside.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Achilles Vs. Forneus
programme.desc: Determined to grow stronger and battle the best, Aiger transfers to Beigoma Academy. His sights are set on battling Valt’s successor, Fubuki Sumiye.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The Final Four!

programme.title: Movie: Sucker Punch

programme.title: Movie: I Feel Pretty

programme.title: The King of Queens: Soft Touch

programme.desc: Doug tries to prove that he is romantic when Carrie is jealous of a co-worker's flowers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Whine Country

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Teaming up with a former competitor, Mark and Digger sell their legacy shine in a neighbouring county. Mike and Jerry double their shine output only to find customers are getting their shine from another source. Mountain man Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Tim hatches a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, Tennessee shiners get busted on camera by cops.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: Tickle's carpentry skills shine as Virginia outlaws plan a risky mod to their still. Mark and Digger take a big swing on a small ingredient that can't pass the sniff test. Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Python Tourniquet
programme.desc: While Dusty and the team stave off the spreading invasion by creating a 'tourniquet' at the Stormwater Treatment Areas, Gary lobbies to go down south and hunt for a new record-breaker.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Lightning Strikes
programme.desc: Moonshine setbacks are the order of the day. Josh hopes to take on a partner while Mark and Digger erect the cornerstone of their massive 3-pot still. Patti and David hunt for clean swamp water and Mike works solo to fulfill and order.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: Tickle's carpentry skills shine as Virginia outlaws plan a risky mod to their still. Mark and Digger take a big swing on a small ingredient that can't pass the sniff test. Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Python Tourniquet
programme.desc: While Dusty and the team stave off the spreading invasion by creating a 'tourniquet' at the Stormwater Treatment Areas, Gary lobbies to go down south and hunt for a new record-breaker.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Goes Rogue
programme.desc: Tickle goes it alone after his still hand Howard gets spooked by an intruder and disappears. Meanwhile, Josh and Bill discover toxic black mould in their underground still site, and Jeff's wife and son set up a second still to run barley scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: An angry landowner busts Tickle, while Tim devises an ingenious new hiding spot for his backup stash of shine. Josh and Bill get into a bone-breaking fight at their new still site, and Mark bootlegs moonshine by canoe in the dead of night.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Bootlegging
programme.desc: Master shiners Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger sit down to discuss bootlegging; a tradition as old as the moonshining craft itself. They're reminiscing about their biggest hauls, closest brushes with the law and revealing their favorite tactics of evasion.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Close Calls
programme.desc: No strangers to risking their lives and freedom for one of the country's most dangerous traditions, Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger look back on their closest calls while braving the harsh wilds and the law to keep the shine flowing.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Fails
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger relive their greatest muck ups from rookie mistakes to season sinking disasters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: End of the Road
programme.desc: Stranded deep in the jungle of Vietnam, Joe and Matt take on a real world survival scenario in untamed terrain, but even their expertise can't change the fact that they're up against the hottest and most humid month of the year in South East Asia.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: One Shot, One Kill
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot, New Zealand's Fiordland, Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario of two hunters following their target into unfamiliar territory, but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No Man Is an Island
programme.desc: Joe sets-off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama. Using his tracking skills, Joe locates Matt Graham and together they face their first survival situation: getting off of a remote Pacific island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Glacial Downfall
programme.desc: On a glacier and clinging to opposite ends of a rope, Joe and Cody face their most challenging rescue scenario ever. The frozen landscape brings Joe and Cody's opposing survival styles to the forefront of this journey.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beyond the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack gathers and gets candid about untold secrets and burning questions that fans have wondered for years. From epic adventure to major struggles, they expose their world like never before.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashionably Late
programme.desc: While Randy's in Barcelona showing his second collection, Chelsea's princess dream dress goes missing from the store and crazy rich Asian bride Cheryl finds fault with every gown she sees.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Mixed Weight Love
programme.desc: Three couples, where the men are hot and the women are obese, endure strain on their relationships and attempt to overcome adversity.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Tale of Two Whitneys
programme.desc: Uncomfortable after her kiss with Buddy, Whitney creates a new business and a new life in Charlotte. When Whitney accepts a date with another man, it may create a love triangle. Plus, tension between Buddy and Tal forces Whitney into a tough decision.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whit's New Man
programme.desc: Whitney hunts for a permanent home in Charlotte. A health scare for Babs causes Whitney to take drastic measures. Meanwhile, sparks fly on Whitney and Chase's first date.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Ghosts of the Past

programme.desc: Two women are hiding their pregnancies for very different reasons. Charity already has five children and Natasha thinks her boyfriend will leave her.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Kelly/ Lauren
programme.desc: Kelly's history of miscarriages keeps her from telling her mom. Lauren is afraid of her father's explosive reaction.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley D's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 700 pounds at 26 years old, Ashley's life is in danger. Ashamed of her body, she mostly hides at home. After bypass surgery, Ashley confronts medical setbacks and struggles to get past the trauma that ignited her eating disorder.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Diana's Story
programme.desc: Diana, a once thin and active woman, is now a prisoner to her 620lb body. Desperate to break free of her food addiction, she trades the comfort of her apartment for a weight loss journey under the strict authority of her niece in order to regain her life.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1

programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pixelated Vision
programme.desc: Michael reels in customers with a new fishing tool and shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive.

programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago hashing out new ideas at a hemp store, inspecting spooky churches and teaming up with special guest star, Jack Black.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Camo Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete goes commando for a treehouse build for clients passionate for competition and survivalist games. In a grove of 10 hackberry trees, Pete designs a camouflage structure with a luxurious interior that could pamper any hardened champion.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Owl Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete pushes his design-skills to create an owl-inspired treehouse library in Charlotte, NC. Evoking the face of the bird and using all sorts of curves, including rounded walls and semi-circle bookcases, the NTS crew constructs a one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Semper Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Pete answers the call of duty to build a treehouse in Pennsylvania that focuses on the children of Marines. Cargo netting off the deck provides an exciting way to enter, while even more nets inside form a bridge to access a private loft space.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Climb-in Drive-In
programme.desc: Pete tackles the first ever climb-in movie theater. Concessions are served to seating pods through a pulley system, and loungers elevate into the trees to give perfect views of the big screen. Pete travels to build a treehouse for monkeys at the LA Zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: The First Ever Field Goal
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Shore-side Structures
