programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Levitating Lighthouse

programme.desc: When a beloved black lab swallows toxic metal, Dr. Jeff races to save his life. A lost cat is found after a year and a half absence, but has a mysterious injury. And, a tiny dog has a big, life-threatening problem.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Award Winning Docs

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Young Blood

programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Untapped Potential in Siem Reap

programme.title: House Hunters: Going Tiny in Reno

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place

programme.title: Move and Improve: A Reno With No End in Sight

programme.title: House Hunters International: Art Gallery in Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: A couple leaves their hectic work life in Chicago to chase their dream of opening an art gallery in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. However, opposing views on space limitations force them to make tough compromises.

programme.desc: A young woman is looking to trade in sea life to be landlocked on Hawaii's Big Island. After being a traveling personal chef, she is eager to finally purchase home with an ocean view.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Little Big Flip

programme.title: Desert Flippers: A Pool with a View
programme.desc: A mountaintop home that is abandoned mid-renovation looks to be a diamond in the rough for Lindsey and Eric.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Hot Mess
programme.desc: Lindsey and Eric seem to be the only ones willing to take on a challenging fire-damaged home with a low price tag and high market risk. What looks like a few charred walls turns out to be a much larger issue that takes a chunk out of the profit.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Just Add Water

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis

programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Primates
programme.desc: By studying the world of primates in new and intimate detail, this episode offers fresh insight into the development of intelligence and social behaviour.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line
programme.desc: A narrow margin separates the top four boats with only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history will come down to the final catch.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Follow six people battling for the basic necessities in Alaska.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter's End
programme.desc: The end of winter season is quickly approaching, and for Chip and Agnes Hailstone this means that they have one last chance to harvest fat caribou until late summer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: Alaskans seek resources and make repairs to vital equipment.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Domino Effect
programme.desc: Alaskans must maximize the 22-hour days to improve their homesteads before the frozen darkness returns.

programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo and Aquarium makes room for three adorable new cheetah cubs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Beauties and the Beasts
programme.desc: There's baby fever at the zoo when the cheetah repopulation program goes into effect.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: All Access: Macaw Mayhem
programme.desc: At the Columbus Zoo, a cheetah undergoes shoulder surgery and 16 rescued macaws are treated.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: All Access: Little Orphan Manatee
programme.desc: After successful rehab at the zoo, keepers return two orphaned manatees to their native waters in Florida.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: All Access: Mother May I?
programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo gears up to welcome some new additions, like three adorable tiger cubs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' in the Rain
programme.desc: Gloomy weather doesn't stop Pol's crew from taking on a range of unique cases, including testy bulls, coughing pigs and wobbly reindeer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goodnight Mooooooon
programme.desc: From unplanned pregnancies and long labors to mystery symptoms and power outages, the vets at Pol Veterinary Services have their hands full!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Peacock-a-Doodle-Do
programme.desc: Spring is on the horizon in central Michigan and with it comes new life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Atlantis is not just a myth, but a real civilization devastated by an apocalyptic volcanic eruption, and now, experts use the latest science to unearth discoveries that might confirm the location of this mysterious lost city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Monster Ships: World's Biggest Sail Ship
programme.desc: The world's biggest sailing ship is an engineering marvel that uses five masts and 42 giant sails to navigate the deadly waters of the Caribbean, and using cutting-edge tech, this innovative vessel can reach high speeds using wind alone.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Hell on Water
programme.desc: The Thermopylae is a massive vehicle carrier and one of the biggest ships ever built, and facing rough waves on deadly seas, her crew must navigate their priceless cargo to destinations on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: One of the largest ships of the Great Lakes is a mammoth freighter named the Algoma Sault, and she and her crew face deadly ice, killer fog, and treacherous canal crossings to safely transport 28,000 tons of coal in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Mega Rig Overhaul
programme.desc: The Saipem 7000 is a gargantuan heavy-lift vessel equipped with two mega-cranes for world's toughest jobs, and now, she's faced with one of her hardest yet: upgrading a 30-year-old oil rig that sits in one of the most treacherous seas in the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Cruise Ship Colossus
programme.desc: The Crown Princess is a titanic cruise ship that weighs over 100,000 tons, and in a race against the clock, its crew must use the latest tech and cutting-edge engineering to prepare for their next voyage.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hell Tower, NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Stirring Up the Dead
programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.desc: Jaime Ramos from Virginia becomes Kodiak PD's only female police officer, and soon has her first encounter with the infamous Kodiak bear. Fairbanks Officer Gerrit Butler, a former MMA professional, must bring down a suspect who also knows martial arts.

programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a deeper look at the case and uncover new information relevant to the trial.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He Seems Perfect
programme.desc: Budding New York fashion designer Jenae Aragosa falls hard for bartender Trevor Frederick. But as a dark side of her new man comes to light, Jenae comes to realize she'll be lucky if she makes it out of this relationship alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Amy Lord
programme.desc: 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord is missing in South Boston. Police first find her burned car and then... her body. Incredible footage from five ATMs and outside her apartment building captures the exact moment she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Lock Up Your Daughters
programme.desc: Gaffney, SC, 1968: When a local reporter receives a mysterious phone call from a murderer who threatens to kill again, Gaffney police must race against the clock to try to save the town's teen girls.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Mother's Little Helper
programme.desc: After the blood-soaked body of 76 year old Franklin Bradshaw is found behind the counter of his auto-parts store, detectives dig into the strained history of his family and uncover a hotbed of deceit, manipulation and all-consuming greed.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Bye Bye Betty
programme.desc: Odessa, TX, 1961: Teenager Betty Williams isn't home. She's not at school. Police are sure she is a runaway, until they uncover a shocking high school rumor that will change this small town forever.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Teenage Wasteland
programme.desc: Lincoln, NE, 1958: When two love-struck, sex-crazed teenagers embark on a killing spree in Lincoln, Nebraska, it will fall to one local sheriff to put the brakes on this nightmare of a joy ride.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Lone Wolves
programme.desc: Vietnam War sniper Carlos Hathcock takes on deadly covert missions, and Max Hardberger recovers illegally seized cargo ships out of dangerous third world ports.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Taking Flight
programme.desc: Rookie pilots George Welch and Kenneth Taylor battle the Japanese over Pearl Harbor, and ace fighter pilot Chuck Yeager becomes the first person to break the sound barrier.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: In Merrie's Memory
programme.desc: Joe and Merrie Colvard dreamed of having an antique log cabin. But only a few weeks after they picked one out on the Boneyard, tragedy struck and Merrie unexpectedly passed away. Joe is determined to build the cabin in his late wife's honour.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Pieces of the Past
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys salvage every last good log they can from an old double-pen barn in Pennsylvania so the logs can be reused to build a guesthouse in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke College
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team saves architectural elements at Roanoke College in Salem, VA. Key items include railings, brick pavers, gothic lighting, and a safe from the 1940s.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Train Caboose into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Hosts Mike and Robert salvage conductor chairs from a train caboose. The whole crew then picks through the Old Cold Storage warehouse in Arrington, VA. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay work together to build a large iron table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reed Creek Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, VA. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Terracotta Silo
programme.desc: The Dawgs struggle to take down a terracotta silo in Bedford, VA. While in town, Mike takes Tay and Grayson to visit the National D-Day Memorial. Back at the shop, Mike builds a coffee table from an old factory cart.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Commotion by the Ocean
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas are back in action looking for their next project, and Rob has his hands full with amazing properties. But, the house that speaks to Rob has big problems. Will the ninjas be able to see the potential?

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Hip-hop Hibachi
programme.desc: Rob designs a VIP hibachi grill for the hero house with fiber-optic lights that change colors with the push of a button.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Crown Jewel Pool
programme.desc: The existing pool looks more like a sewer than a swimming pool and it has got to go. Rob has grand plans to turn this frog into a prince. By changing its location and giving it a whole new shape, it'll become the crown jewel it was meant to be.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Fixin' the Kitchen
programme.desc: Rob has an idea to transform his dated kitchen space into a chef's retreat. Floor to ceiling sliders replace the far wall and provide a view to the ocean. The kitchen is given bran new appliances and a window backsplash.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Making an Entrance
programme.desc: The current entryway is dated and hated, so the ninjas open up the space and add modern glass features and a high-tech elevator.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: From Virtual to Reality
programme.desc: Technology and style go toe-to-toe when the ninjas tackle the spare rooms and game room. White walls disappear as an underwater mural takes shape and marine windows are installed.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Wrath of the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas give the master bath a clean and serene upgrade with luxurious finishes. New marble floors, an elegant vanity and an all-glass shower make this a relaxation station fit for royalty.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Master Suite Disaster
programme.desc: Rob overhauls the master bedroom and transforms it into an oasis with a view. Glass doors replace the entire wall and open up to a brand new balcony with its own spiral staircase. His final touch is a TV that drops from the ceiling.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Bosses
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is honoring the legendary pitmasters who make some of the country's best barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger Mooking loves a great sandwich, and searches the country for the top 15 sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Global Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking takes 15 gastronomical trips for the most exotic, flavourful and spicy foods all without leaving the U.S. The featured chefs create classic international meals from Ethiopia, Thailand, Mexico and more in their own American kitchens.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: America Talks Live

programme.title: Maury: Is My Fiance Having an Affair With My Sister-In-Law? Test Them
programme.desc: Charity wants to find out if her childhood love, Carlos is cheating on her! She discovered a mountain of evidence in his truck that that suggests he is.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Former roommates dispute unpaid rent; the defendant says the plaintiff's friends at his food and stole his belongings. Then, a man sold a family friend a car; the buyer says she was duped.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Dice Lady Cometh
programme.desc: Molly looks to win some extra cash when she and the girls head to a riverboat casino for the weekend. Meanwhile, Mike and Vince try to enjoy some college basketball when the guys come over to watch television.

programme.title: Mom: Cheeseburger Salad and Jazz
programme.desc: Christy is concerned with the way Bonnie is processing Alvin's death and tries to get her professional help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: Charlie rethinks his ways after he, Alan and Jake must cheer up a dejected Evelyn. Meanwhile, Charlie teaches Jake some lessons about screening calls from women.

programme.title: Black-ish: Working Girl
programme.desc: Bow struggles to adjust as she returns to work after maternity leave. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing homework.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane bring home the results of their career tests, Dre and Bow must come to terms with the fact that Jack may have a blue-collar future. Meanwhile, Ruby is convinced Diane is possessed with a little help from Junior and Zoey.

programme.title: Arrow: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part Four
programme.desc: The Paragons search for a way to escape the Vanishing Point. The futility of the situation is compounded by The Flash's disappearance, but hope appears in the form of Oliver, who reveals that he has something better.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part Five
programme.desc: The Earth-shattering 'Crisis on Infinites Earths' Crossover concludes. 'Worlds lived, worlds died. Nothing Will ever be the same.'

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Six friends living in New York City try to navigate their way through life's ups and downs while finding support from each other.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Keys
programme.desc: Jerry demands that Kramer return the spare key to his apartment when he is over too often.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: First Date
programme.desc: When Molly gets a cold before her first date with Mike, she takes cold medication to help her feel better with disastrous results.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Goldberg Girls
programme.desc: Afraid she'll be all alone in her old age, Beverly attempts to bond with other moms to form their own group like the TV show 'The Golden Girls,' while Erica gets annoyed at Geoff's romantic gestures, almost causing them to break up.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Fiddler
programme.desc: Murray becomes an overzealous stage parent when he learns Adam has no interest in the school production of 'Fiddler on the Roof.' Meanwhile, Beverly can't seem to keep from interfering with Erica's latest career plan.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to bring in extra money to help pay off their bank loan by taking second jobs as a pastry chef and a hostess at a chic restaurant.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Take These Vows and Shove 'Em
programme.desc: When Jason confesses that he's not ready to give up steroids, Kelly realizes she has no other choice but to take Brittany and leave Jason. A gorgeous girl catches Derwin's eye, but when he tries to give her game she schools him on being real.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Restaurant Opening
programme.desc: At the grand opening of The Outdoor Man Grill, things get tense when restaurant manager Kristin feels like co-owner Ed is undermining her ability to run the place. Meanwhile, Eve distances herself from a childhood friend who seems to have a crush on her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: May vs. Junkert
programme.desc: A man suspects his fiancé wants a threesome with him and his twin brother after discovering twin porn on his phone.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: This Means Tug of War/ Happy Wife Happy Life
programme.desc: A competitive game of tug-of-war leads to an injury; An interior designer seeks compensation.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bonk Bonk on the Statue
programme.desc: A valuable statue is broken at an antique store.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Conner vs. Wallce
programme.desc: A man claims the child-support he’s paid for a child that’s not his has caused him and his family hardship.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Time to Pay Up!/ My Bad Puppy
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues for value of watch; woman sues former friend for unpaid vet bill.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man with three children doubts he is the father to her unborn baby and petitions the court for a paternity test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Getting Into it With a Neighbor' and 'Stealing From a Family.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: I'm Not Going/ Oh Goat No!
programme.desc: Woman deliberately taints food; a goat damages a designer dress.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff says an unfinished construction job caused her to fall and break her leg; the defendant says he wasn't permitted to finish the job. Then, a former friend is sued for crashing at the plaintiff's place and not paying rent.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: When I Pass, Let Me See My Son
programme.desc: Janai suspects her partner Markell molested their son; Kristie has lost custody of her children due to allegations of sexual abuse.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove Your Husband Got My Teen Daughter Pregnant!
programme.desc: Paul is back, because he cheated with a twenty-year old, who says he got her pregnant. Tamia believes her man Reuben is having an affair. Then, Anna came to this country for the American Dream, but hears her man is ashamed of her because of her weight.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Surprise, I'm a Transsexual Stripper
programme.desc: Antwon says his Facebook crush, Johanna, wants to have more than just a fling with him. However Johanna hasn’t been completely honest with Antwon.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Four friends face the promise and pitfalls of life in the 1990s when they share a house.

programme.title: Movie: In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters, with opposite dispositions, find out what bonds them together after meeting the grandmother they never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Just a Kiss
programme.desc: A group of thirtysomethings in Manhattan find themselves struggling with fidelity.

programme.title: Movie: Cedar Rapids
programme.desc: A man leaves his sleepy town for the first time in 34 years to represent his insurance company at a convention.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampett family strikes oil in the Ozark swamps, they move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Movie: The Last of the Blonde Bombshells
programme.desc: A recent widow looks to reunite the all-girl swing band she played in during the war.

programme.title: Movie: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: A teenage, secret agent goes undercover at a prep school to obtain access to a scientist.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: The Making of: The Old Man & the Gun
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Movie: American Splendor
programme.desc: A comic book writer meets a woman and they enjoy a depressive relationship together.

programme.title: Movie: Easy Money
programme.desc: A hard-living gambling addict must change his lifestyle in order to inherit a fortune.

programme.title: Tracy Morgan: Black and Blue
programme.desc: Star of '30 Rock,' former SNL regular and Emmy nominee Tracy Morgan makes his HBO stand-up debut in this solo comedy special, featuring the comedian's unpredictable and freewheeling brand of humour in an uncensored setting.
